name: Shape Robotics A/S
summary: Shape Robotics A/S, an educational technology company, develops robot systems for education purpose worldwide. The company develops Fable, a robot system that offers educational robot kits for use in teaching programs, robotics, and innovations in middle and secondary schools, as well as in universities. It also offers Fable Connect, a telepresence robotics system that enables schools to get homebound students back in the classroom using the robot as a communication device. The company sells its products directly, as well as through distributors and resellers. Shape Robotics A/S was founded in 2011 and is based in Farum, Denmark.
